name: AI Interview Coach - Word Document Generator

values.content:
=You are an AI interview coach.

Create a personalized interview preparation plan.

Candidate name:
{{$json.body.name}}

Target position:
{{$json.body.job}}

Company:
{{$json.body.company}}

1. A personalized interview introduction question
2. 5 likely interview questions
3. STAR method answer tips
4. Preparation advice for the company and role
